translations.en: He said: Of course, I will tell you. I was a grave robber for seven years. I would exhume the dead and take their shrouds. A young woman from the daughters of the Ansar died. When she was carried to her grave, buried, and her family left, and night fell, I came to her grave and exhumed her. Then I took her out and removed her shrouds, leaving her bare at the edge of her grave. I went to leave, but Satan came to me and began making her attractive to me, saying: Do you not see her stomach and her whiteness? Do you not see her hips? He did not stop saying this until I returned to her, and I could not control myself until I had relations with her and left her in her place. Then I heard a voice from behind me saying: O youth, woe to you from the Judge of the Day of Judgment, the day He raises me and you just as you left me naked among the dead, exhumed me from my grave, stripped my shrouds, and left me in ritual impurity before my Judgment. Woe to your youth from the Fire. I do not think I shall ever smell the scent of Paradise. What do you see for me, O Messenger of Allah?
